description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI that runs on push to master and try-import branches and on pull requests. Implement a concurrency strategy that cancels in-progress jobs for the same reference. The workflow should have three jobs: check-commit to lint commits for pull requests, auto-merge to automatically merge try-import into master if the reference matches, and send-dingding to send a DingTalk notification if the auto-merge job succeeds and the reference matches.
